# onelogin_app (Data Source)

Use this data source to read a OneLogin App by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an app by ID
data "onelogin_app" "example" {
  id = 12345
}

output "app_name" {
  value = data.onelogin_app.example.name
}

output "connector_id" {
  value = data.onelogin_app.example.connector_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The app ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `allow_assumed_signin` (Boolean) Whether assumed sign-in is allowed.
- `auth_method` (Number) The authentication method.
- `brand_id` (Number) The brand ID for the app.
- `configuration` (String) App configuration as a JSON string.
- `connector_id` (Number) The connector ID for the app type.
- `created_at` (String) When the app was created.
- `description` (String) A description of the app.
- `icon_url` (String) The URL of the app's icon.
- `name` (String) The name of the app.
- `notes` (String) Notes about the app.
- `policy_id` (Number) The security policy ID.
- `sso` (String) SSO settings as a JSON string.
- `tab_id` (Number) The tab ID.
- `updated_at` (String) When the app was last updated.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether the app is visible to users.
